description_long: This is a rectangular hardcover book with a textured, stone-like gray cover featuring a large, circular cutout or depression in the center, revealing a deep blue interior beneath. The book's cover is adorned with bold, white text in a modern, sans-serif font, and the edges of the pages are visible as a uniform, light gray band. The spine is dark with prominent white text running horizontally, and the book appears thick and sturdy. The overall design is minimalist, with the central circular feature drawing immediate attention. There are no visible illustrations or decorative elements apart from the text and the central cutout.
description: A thick, gray hardcover book with a large circular cutout in the center of the cover and bold white text. The design is minimalist and modern, with a striking blue interior visible through the cutout.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the large circular cutout and all the main white text, with the blue interior exposed.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thickness of the pages and the edge of the circular cutout.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, with the circular cutout still apparent but the text is upside down and less readable.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, displaying the title 'GHOSTWATER' in large white letters on a dark background.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark with large, bold white text reading 'GHOSTWATER' horizontally. The design is simple and modern, with no decorative elements.
